date.long: the twenty-seventh of August, two thousand and twenty-six

note.title: Dearly beloved,
paragraphs: What began as a quiet coincidence — a chance meeting at a friend’s Sunday lunch in Ikoyi — has, by some uncommon grace, become the life we now build together.
On the twenty-seventh of August, two thousand and twenty-six, we will say to one another what we have already promised in private. We would consider it the deepest honour to have you with us.
